basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute For Interdisciplinary Science (CSIR NIIST)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute For Interdisciplinary Science (CSIR NIIST) Multi-Tasking Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 16-05-2026 on the official website of CSIR NIIST. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIIST to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Staff post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Staff position is Matriculation or an equivalent pass from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Multi-Tasking Staff position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Multi-Tasking Staff post is 25 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Multi-Tasking Staff post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Multi-Tasking Staff position in the CSIR NIIST recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Multi-Tasking Staff post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Multi-Tasking Staff position will be as per the PML-01 pay level, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where is CSIR NIIST located?
faq.answer: CSIR NIIST is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695019.

faq.question: Q8. When does the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process for the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff recruitment begins on 16th May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff recruitment is 01/2026.
